news.paragraph: Okta has recently seen its stock price slide despite broader market gains, even as some analysts continue to weigh bullish investment views. The software sector is also navigating potential volatility following news regarding Cloudflare. No immediate catalysts such as earnings or regulatory actions are explicitly mentioned in the recent headlines.
headlines: Okta (OKTA) Stock Slides as Market Rises: Facts to Know Before You Trade
